svg.aria-label: The biggest lesson that can be read from 70 years of AI research is that general methods that leverage computation are ultimately the most effective, and by a large margin. — Rich Sutton, The Bitter Lesson

g.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
g.text: “The biggest lesson that can be read from 70
years of AI research is that general methods
that leverage computation are ultimately the
most effective, and by a large margin.”
